title: Supreme Dark Ruler
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Supreme Dark Ruler''', or just '''Supreme Ruler''', was a title or epithet applied to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] and [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

==Behind the scenes==
The first edition of ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]'' contained an entry on this title, quoting from the [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Return of the Jedi'' novelization]]. It was omitted from later editions, which may mean that the term was reinterpreted as part of [[James Kahn]]'s narration rather than an in-universe title.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1984-12-XX -->''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''
